title: Enchanted Glistering Melon
description:
Enchanted Glistering Melon / Enchanted Golden Melon is a datapack that adds a craftable melon imbued with extra power.
Eating it grants Instant Health, Regeneration, Resistance, and Absorption for a limited duration.
body: # Enchanted Glistering Melon Enchanted Glistering Melon is a datapack that adds a craftable melon imbued with extra power. Eating it grants Instant Health, Regeneration, Resistance, and Absorption for a limited duration. [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Join%20our%20Discord-%235865F2.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/wgSCCaQN5W) ![Enchanted Glistering Melon Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gLVs7kHh/images/47d97bba24a313a6d6ce5c5d3794bf3179a6a8ff.webp) ![Enchanted Glistering Melon Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gLVs7kHh/images/fdad1d56250524fb9736783852beb53bab6ac057.png) ## Installation ### Datapack 1. Download the Datapack. 2. Copy the .zip file into the datapacks folder which is located under `%APPDATA%\.minecraft\saves\\datapacks` (under Windows). Replace correspondingly. 3. Reload the World or run the `/reload` command. ### Mod 1. Download the Mod. 2. Copy the downloaded `.jar` file into the mods folder which is located under `%APPDATA%\.minecraft\mods` (under Windows). 3. Reload the World or run the `/reload` command. ## Bug Reports and Feature Requests If you found bugs or need support, contact us by joining [our discord server](https://discord.gg/wgSCCaQN5W).
